title: Who or what is the shadow seen at the end of Eva 222
display_title: Who or what is the shadow seen at the end of Eva 222
wikitext:
[]: Who or what is the shadow seen at the end of Eva 2.22?             Quote Post by ianthegamer » Sat Oct 08, 2016 11:29 pm When Mari shows Shinji the destruction after the N2 missile it cuts to scenes. One shows a destroyed vehicle with a shadow of someone/something hunched on a rock. Is this just a random dead person, or is it more? If this was already discussed please excuse and add the forum link if possible. Just re watched 2.22 and noticed it.

[]: Re: Who or what is the shadow seen at the end of Eva 2.22?             Quote Post by Ray » Sun Oct 09, 2016 12:00 am I doubt it is, but if Anno intended that little detail to be anyone important, it's probably one of these guys. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Who or what is the shadow seen at the end of Eva 2.22?             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Sun Oct 09, 2016 12:17 am I've always thought it's probably a dead NERV technician or something of the sort who wasn't able to clear out before Rei set off the N2 missile. There are two more bodies directly below that one.

[]: Re: Who or what is the shadow seen at the end of Eva 2.22?             Quote Post by ianthegamer » Sun Oct 09, 2016 12:20 am Ah. I didnt see the others.

[]: Re: Who or what is the shadow seen at the end of Eva 2.22?             Quote Post by Ray » Sun Oct 09, 2016 12:22 am There are two more bodies directly below that one.

[]: Re: Who or what is the shadow seen at the end of Eva 2.22?             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Oct 09, 2016 1:02 am It's a dead guy.

[]: Re: Who or what is the shadow seen at the end of Eva 2.22?             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Sun Oct 09, 2016 7:49 am Ray wrote: Oh dear well that doesn't bode well. . . Three classmates, three bodies. But if that is them then where's the penguin?

[]: Re: Who or what is the shadow seen at the end of Eva 2.22?             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Oct 12, 2016 6:54 pm BlueBasilisk wrote: Besides, Sakura acts like Toji's still around in the future

[]: Re: Who or what is the shadow seen at the end of Eva 2.22?             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Wed Oct 12, 2016 9:16 pm Perhaps I should have said "she doesn't act like he's dead." No use of past tense or anything like that and she doesn't seem particularly sad talking about him. Reichu wrote: One interesting suggestion I've seen, tho, is that she rubs her nose and smiles because she's stifling the urge to cry.

[]: Re: Who or what is the shadow seen at the end of Eva 2.22?             Quote Post by mammaluser » Thu Oct 27, 2016 9:10 pm It's probably a casualty of the explosion, after all they did the same with NGE
